title: Franky Begins His Fight
description: Pages 6–10 focus on franky begins his fight, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as franky, the Tontatta, and the Straw Hats push into the hidden factory network beneath Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ohhh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Riku Royal Army Rebel- Lion HQ.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: At this point, we'll take the underground passage...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: and emerge into the commerce port, in enemy territory!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Flower Fields (Current location)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Commerce Port

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: All we're after is that one little girl!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: SUGAR!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: She may look like a girl, but don't understand- mate her!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We'll knock out sugar, and turn all the toys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...throughout the country back into humans!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Uohhhhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So near- now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's gonna be a tight fit for Robind and me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Fraland, you're gonna have to take off those shoulders and arms of yours.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: As if I could!! Hey, going through this little passage is impossible for me-land!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: We never assumed that big humans would be using it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: You'll just have to enter via the toy house.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: The toy house is right at the base...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: ...of the plateau that holds the Royal Palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: All the toys return there every night.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: And Mu- Mans aren't allowed to ever step foot in there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: It's a "house" in name only.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Because it's not as if there are beds to sleep in or anything like that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: All there is is is a passage that stretches down to the under- ground.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Every night, all the toys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Labor until the dawn.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: That's horri- BLE....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: So the toys in the city are always dead tired!?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Anyway, if Fraland goes that way, can he also get to the smile factory!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: There are four entrances total, in each of the cardi- NAL directions!! But they're all sure to be securely guarded!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: I'll just take this oppor- tuning to go wild, then!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: And won't that work out for the best?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: While I'm distracting them...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Stand

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: ...you guys can hurry and take down sugar!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: What's with this guy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: Is he wearing a speedo!!?

summary: Franky Begins His Fight focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as franky, the Tontatta, and the Straw Hats push into the hidden factory network beneath Dressrosa.
